subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-03 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: We went to visit the children of some poor souls yesterday and saw their pitiful living conditions. As we were returning
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیروز بدیدن اطفال فقرا رفتیم جای بسیار محقری داشتند ولی چون مراجعت میکردیم
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
